headline: FranklinWH Energy Storage Systems Selected for Two New Texas Virtual Power Plant Programs
summary: FranklinWH Energy Storage Inc. announced today that the FranklinWH System has been selected to participate in two new Texas utility virtual power plant (VPP) programs: the Austin Energy Power Partner Battery Pilot and the Entergy Texas Battery Storage Solutions program.
